item.name: Mammet #003G
item.description:
A fully operational clockwork puppet built for the Order of the Twin Adder.

Use item to acquire the mammet #003G minion.
item.tooltip:
Feelings! Maybe she just
doesn't feel like part of
the team!?
  - Wedge
item.specialactiondescription: Grants 10 action points to all allies within range who do not have similar actions.

obj.n: Bump on a Log: Order of the Twin Adder
